title: Kailarsenia godefroyana
intro: Kailarsenia godefroyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. The bioactive constituents of Kailarsenia godefroyana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Kailarsenia godefroyana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.

The genus Kailarsenia is a small group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia.
